en: Pick a card to permanently upgrade for the rest of the run.
zh: 选择一张卡牌，在本次运行剩余时间内永久强化。

en: (All cards in your deck are already upgraded.)
Upgraded cards show a [+] suffix on their name.
zh: 已强化的卡牌名称带有 [+] 后缀。

en: Select a gem then click an empty socket to insert it (locked after).
zh: 选择一颗宝石后点击空插槽嵌入（嵌入后锁定）。

en: No gems yet — defeat elites to find them.
zh: 暂无宝石 —— 击败精英可获得。

en: Press I or ESC to close
zh: 按 I 或 ESC 关闭

en: Save slots full — delete one to start a new game
zh: 存档已满 —— 删除一个以开始新游戏
空存档 —— 开始新游戏

en: Overwrite this slot? This erases its progress.
zh: 覆盖此存档？这会清除它的进度。

en: Delete this save? This permanently erases its progress.
zh: 删除此存档？这会永久清除它的进度。

en: Your run ends here. The wasteland claims another salvager.
zh: 你的旅程到此为止。废土又吞噬了一名拾荒者。

en: You cleared the Act 1 boss. Thanks for playing the demo!
zh: 你击败了第一幕的 Boss。感谢试玩!

en: Wishlist the full game on Steam to play all three acts.
zh: 在 Steam 上将完整版加入愿望单,体验全部三幕。
英雄:{hero}   第 {act} 幕   第 {floor} 层

en: Energy: you get 3 energy each turn. Playing a card costs energy; leftover energy is lost when the turn ends.
zh: 能量:每回合获得 3 点能量。打出卡牌消耗能量,回合结束时未用完的能量清零。

en: Cards: drag an ATTACK card onto an enemy to target it. Drag SKILL / ABILITY cards upward into the play zone.
zh: 卡牌:把攻击牌拖到敌人身上指定目标;把技能/能力牌向上拖入出牌区。

en: Block: block absorbs incoming damage this turn, then resets to 0 at the start of your next turn.
zh: 格挡:格挡抵消本回合受到的伤害,下回合开始时归零。

en: Attributes: Strength adds to all attack damage, Constitution to all block, plus Intelligence / Luck / Charm. Level up in a run to raise them.
zh: 属性:力量加成所有攻击伤害,体质加成所有格挡,另有智力/幸运/魅力。局内升级可提升属性。

en: Gems: socket a gem into a card outside combat to permanently enhance that card for the rest of the run.
zh: 宝石:战斗外把宝石嵌入卡牌,在本局剩余时间永久强化该卡。

en: Backpack: gold, Core and gear share 20 cells. If you die you lose everything except the first safe cells.
zh: 背包:金币、核心和装备共用 20 格。死亡会丢失除前几个安全格以外的所有东西。

en: Intents: the icon above each enemy shows what it will do next turn — plan your block and attacks around it.
zh: 意图:敌人头顶的图标显示它下回合的行动,据此安排你的格挡和进攻。

en: Welcome! Spend energy (top-left) to play cards from your hand.
zh: 欢迎!消耗能量(左上角)打出手牌。

en: Drag an ATTACK card onto an enemy to hit it. Drag SKILL cards upward to play them.
zh: 把攻击牌拖到敌人身上攻击;把技能牌向上拖出来打出。

en: Each enemy's intent icon shows its next move. Gain Block to survive big hits.
zh: 每个敌人的意图图标显示它的下一步。获得格挡来扛住重击。

en: Out of moves? Press END TURN. Good luck out there!
zh: 没法行动了?点击结束回合。祝你好运!
